raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tee Wihlisterti:
kaś irr to darrijs? tad tappe faz-
zihts: Simsans ta Timinitexa
Snohts/ tapehz ka tas wiꞥna
Seewu irr rehmts/ un wiꞥna
Beedram dewis irr/ tad nahze
tee Wihlisterti augſcham/ un fa-
dedsinaja wiꞥnu/ un wiꞥnas
Tehwu ar Uggunt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Simsans us winn
teem: Jepſchu juhsto effat dar-
rijschi/ tomehr es atreebschohs
prettjums/ un tad es mitteschohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fitte tohś pahr Plez-
zehin un Gurneem ar leelu Kan-
ſchanu/ un wiꞥsch nogahje/ un
dsibwoja eekſch Eetaima Akmina-
Kalna Allas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad gahje tee Wihlisterti
augſcham/ un apmette Lehgeri
prett Juhdu/ un nolaſtdahs eeſch
Leejas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Wihri no Juhda
fazzija: Kapehz effat juhś prett
muńs zehlufchees? un tee fazzija:
mehś effam nahkuſcht to Sim-
sanu faistiht/ ka mehś wiꞥnam
darram/ itt ka wiꞥsch muńs
darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nonahze trihstuht-
stoschi Wihri no Juhda us Eeta-
ma Akmina-Kalna Allu/ un faz-
ziha us Simsanu: Woj tu ne fin-
ni/ ka tee Wihlisterti pahr muńs
walda? kapehz tad effi tu muńs
fcho darrijs? un wiꞥsch fazzija us
teem: ka tee man irr darriſcht/ ta
eſmu es teem atkat darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fazzija us winn
Mehś effam nonahkuſcht tew fa-
stiht/ un tew nodoht to Wihliſ-
ru Rohka. Un Simsans faz-
ja us teem: Swehrejeet ma-
ka juhś prett mann ne grihb
turretees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un teerunnaja us winn
fazzidami: Ne/ bet mehś effa-
nahkuſcht tew faistiht/ un te-
wiꞥnu Rohka nodoht/ bet me-
tew ne nokauſun/ vn tee faisti-
wiꞥnu ar diwi jaunahm Wi-
wehm/ un wedde to augſcham i-
ta Akmiſta-Kalna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad uu wiꞥsch lihds Leej-
nahze/ tad garvileja tee Wihlist-
et wiꞥnam pretti/ bet ta KUD-
GA Gars nahze pahr wiꞥnu/ u-
tahś Wirwes/ kas pee wiꞥ-
Rohkahm bija/ kna itt ka lin-
Pawedexti/ ko tas Ugguns i-
apfwillinnajs/ un wiꞥna Sait-
kuffe no wiꞥna Rohkahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch atradde ween-
eetruhdejschu Ehseta Schohkt-
Kaulu/ tad issteepe wiꞥsch Jaw-
Rohku/ un zehme to/ un fit-
ar to tuhktsochus Wihrus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Simsans fazzija: za-
weenu Ehseta Schohkt-Kaul-
(gull) Kohpa pee Kohpas/ ar wee-
nu Ehseta Schohkt-Kaulu eſm-
es tuhktsochus Wihrus kawis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥsch bij isrun-
najs/ tad noimette wiꞥsch t-
Schohkt-Kaulu no Jawas Roh-
kas/ un noſanze to Weetu Ra-
mat-Leeja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad uu wiꞥsch tohti bij-
Rrr 3
isflah-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
